---
title: "Damilola Sule"
image: "files/IMG_3165.jpeg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:dsule@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/damilola-sule-a2798424a
---

## Hello!

Welcome to my website! I’m Damilola Sule, a Business Analytics graduate student at the Rady School of Management at UC San Diego.

I’m passionate about data, sports, and using analytics to solve real-world problems. As a student-athlete on the UCSD Women’s Basketball Team, I’ve developed strong discipline, teamwork, and leadership skills that carry over into my academic and professional work.

## About Me

I have a background in Cognitive Behavioral Neuroscience and am currently pursuing my Master’s in Business Analytics. My interests lie in data analysis, marketing analytics, and applying quantitative methods to decision-making.

Through both academic work and hands-on experience, I’ve built skills in Python, SQL, R, and data visualization tools like Tableau and Power BI.

## My Interests

:::{.card-container}

:::{.info-card}
### Sports & Health
I play basketball at UCSD and have a strong interest in sports performance, health, and wellness. Athletics has shaped my mindset around discipline, resilience, and teamwork.
:::

:::{.info-card}
### Data & Analytics
I enjoy working with data to uncover insights, build models, and support decision-making. I’m especially interested in pricing analytics, marketing analytics, and behavioral data.
:::

:::{.info-card}
### Career Goals
My goal is to build a career in analytics where I can combine technical skills with real-world impact — ideally in sports, tech, or business strategy.
:::

:::

## Quick Links

- [My LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/damilola-sule-a2798424a)
- [Email Me](mailto:dsule@ucsd.edu)
- [View My Projects](projects.qmd)

## A Favorite Quote

> “Be Great Always”
